account.title: My account
account.languageHint: Language of the administration interface. Your choice is saved to your profile.
account.passwordMismatch: The new passwords do not match.
account.passwordTooShort: The new password must be at least 8 characters long.
account.passwordError: The password could not be changed.
account.languageError: The language could not be changed.
account.mailHint: Control whether you receive informational emails from the system (e.g. a hint that a referee feedback form is available).
account.receiveInfoMails: Receive informational emails from the system
account.mailPrefError: The setting could not be saved.
account.emailHint: Your email address for login and system messages. A change only takes effect after you confirm the new address via the link sent by email (valid for 24 hours).
account.emailChangeRequested: Confirmation email sent. Please confirm the new address within 24 hours.
account.emailPendingHint: Your current address stays active until the change is confirmed. Submitting again sends a new link.
account.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address.

session.loginBlocked: Your account is not enabled for login. Sorry.
session.lostPasswordSent: If an account exists, you will receive an email.

emailConfirmation.successMessage: Your new email address is now active. From now on you can also use it to log in.
emailConfirmation.errorMessage: The confirmation link is invalid or has expired. You can restart the change under “My account”.
